mapper.sql: vid, title, duration, price, addtime, url, cover, tria, type, author, yunpankey, uptag, uptag13681594428, urlid, sales, goodtag, urlkey2, uptag3
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from zmq_video
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into zmq_video (vid, title, duration, price, addtime, url, cover, tria, type, author, yunpankey, uptag, uptag13681594428, urlid, sales, goodtag, urlkey2, uptag3 ) values (#{vid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{duration,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{addtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cover,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{tria,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{author,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{yunpankey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uptag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{uptag13681594428,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{urlid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{sales,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{goodtag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{urlkey2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{uptag3,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

insert into zmq_video
vid,
title,
duration,
price,
addtime,
url,
cover,
tria,
type,
author,
yunpankey,
uptag,
uptag13681594428,
urlid,
sales,
goodtag,
urlkey2,
uptag3,

#{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{duration,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{price,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{addtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},

mapper.update:
update zmq_video
vid = #{record.vid,jdbcType=INTEGER},
title = #{record.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
duration = #{record.duration,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{record.price,jdbcType=INTEGER},
addtime = #{record.addtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
url = #{record.url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cover = #{record.cover,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tria = #{record.tria,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{record.type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
author = #{record.author,jdbcType=INTEGER},
yunpankey = #{record.yunpankey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
uptag = #{record.uptag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
uptag13681594428 = #{record.uptag13681594428,jdbcType=INTEGER},
urlid = #{record.urlid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sales = #{record.sales,jdbcType=INTEGER},
goodtag = #{record.goodtag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
urlkey2 = #{record.urlkey2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
uptag3 = #{record.uptag3,jdbcType=INTEGER},

update zmq_video set vid = #{record.vid,jdbcType=INTEGER}, title = #{record.title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, duration = #{record.duration,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{record.price,jdbcType=INTEGER}, addtime = #{record.addtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, url = #{record.url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cover = #{record.cover,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tria = #{record.tria,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{record.type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, author = #{record.author,jdbcType=INTEGER}, yunpankey = #{record.yunpankey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uptag = #{record.uptag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, uptag13681594428 = #{record.uptag13681594428,jdbcType=INTEGER}, urlid = #{record.urlid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sales = #{record.sales,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goodtag = #{record.goodtag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, urlkey2 = #{record.urlkey2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uptag3 = #{record.uptag3,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update zmq_video
title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
duration = #{duration,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=INTEGER},
addtime = #{addtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cover = #{cover,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
tria = #{tria,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER},
author = #{author,jdbcType=INTEGER},
yunpankey = #{yunpankey,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
uptag = #{uptag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
uptag13681594428 = #{uptag13681594428,jdbcType=INTEGER},
urlid = #{urlid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sales = #{sales,jdbcType=INTEGER},
goodtag = #{goodtag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
urlkey2 = #{urlkey2,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
uptag3 = #{uptag3,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where vid = #{vid,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update zmq_video set title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, duration = #{duration,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=INTEGER}, addtime = #{addtime,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, url = #{url,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cover = #{cover,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, tria = #{tria,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=INTEGER}, author = #{author,jdbcType=INTEGER}, yunpankey = #{yunpankey,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uptag = #{uptag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, uptag13681594428 = #{uptag13681594428,jdbcType=INTEGER}, urlid = #{urlid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sales = #{sales,jdbcType=INTEGER}, goodtag = #{goodtag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, urlkey2 = #{urlkey2,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, uptag3 = #{uptag3,jdbcType=INTEGER} where vid = #{vid,jdbcType=INTEGER}
